name: activity_types
description: Manage activity types — add new activity type, update an activity type, get all activity types. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the activity type

parameters.name: icon_key
parameters.description: Icon graphic to use for representing this activity type

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: A designated color for the activity type in 6-character HEX format (e.g. `FFFFFF` for white, `000000` for black)
